programme.desc: Tajuk sajak Kijang Yang Lelah ini membincangkan tentang maksud sajak serta komponen sastera yang terkandung dalam sajak ini dan tentang tema, persoalan, gaya bahasa, nilai dan pengajaran.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 4 Ep02
programme.desc: Murid diperdengarkan dendangan syair untuk membangkitkan keseronokan dan menarik minat. Isi pelajaran menyentuh aspek maksud syair mengikut rangkap, tema, persoalan, gaya bahasa, nilai dan pengajaran.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 4 Ep03

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 5

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 1 Ep01

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 1 Ep02

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 2 Ep01

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu! - EP 3
programme.desc: With a cool 16C breeze in the air, Karthick dives deeper into Serbia’s soul. From echoes of the Kosovo War to the grand elegance of Hotel Moskva, this journey is full of contrasts. But nostalgia hits hard when he starts craving home-cooked food—so what does he do? He fires up the stove and cooks a spicy sardine sambal, right in the heart of Serbia! Can he recreate Grandma’s magic?

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu! - EP 4
programme.desc: Next stop: Sofia, Bulgaria! Karthick kicks off his day with a local breakfast that tastes like a crispy prata wrapped around an apple pie—yes, you read that right! But that’s just the beginning. He steps into history at the only Ottoman-built mosque in the city, strolls through the charming streets of Bulgaria, and wraps up the day with a feast fit for a king...

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1

programme.title: Strangers in Danger

programme.desc: Delivers timely and in-depth coverage of key global events, focusing on international politics, economics, and societal changes, with a spotlight on the latest developments impacting the world today.

programme.title: TVS Music
programme.desc: TVS Music is a compilation of songs that celebrates the rich and diverse musical talents of the region, featuring a mix of contemporary hits and culturally inspired tracks from local artists.

programme.title: Fail 420 Ep04
programme.desc: A crime documentary on scam cases reported to Sarawak's Police Commercial Unit, revealing modus operandi, victim profiles, true-event reenactments, and expert advice on detecting and avoiding scams.

programme.title: Setenang Mata Memandang Ep05
programme.desc: Travelogue program that follows two hosts on their journey to discover hidden gems in Sarawak's natural beauty, including national parks, mountains, valleys, lakes, rivers, waterfalls, and islands.

programme.title: (L) TVS Sana Sini
programme.desc: A local perspective on international and domestic affairs, TVS Sana Sini offers concise news stories the Weather Report, providing a look at climate and environmental conditions affecting the country

programme.title: Borneo Dive Ep02
programme.desc: Explore the unique dive sites of Sabah and Sarawak, which attract both local and international divers. The region offers a rich variety of marine life for recreational and avid divers to observe.

programme.title: (DL) Detik Dunia
programme.desc: Detik Dunia membawakan rangkuman berita antarabangsa, mengetengahkan perkembangan global serta kisah-kisah yang membentuk landskap dunia hari ini.

programme.title: (DL) TVS Ringkas
programme.desc: TVS Ringkas brings the latest breaking news, offering quick and essential updates from both within the country and around the globe.

programme.title: TVS Fillers
programme.desc: TVS Fillers delivers quick, engaging segments on Sarawakian culture, local trends, and more, keeping viewers entertained between programs.

programme.title: Sanggar Vista Ep05
programme.desc: Menjejak rumah-rumah cantik di Sarawak. Keindahan adalah subjektif, maka program ini menampil pelbagai jenis rumah, bukan hanya banglo mewah, tetapi juga rumah tradisional dan sederhana yang dihias indah.

programme.title: Kapit Unveiled Ep03
programme.desc: This travel show takes viewers on a journey to Kapit,a hidden gem in Borneo,showcasing its Iban culture,stunning landscapes,untamed wilderness,making it an emerging tourism hotspot along the Rajang river.

programme.title: (L) Berita Iban TVS
programme.desc: Berita Iban memaparkan berita-berita terkini di seluruh Malaysia dalam bahasa Iban

programme.title: Kubah Borneo Ep10
programme.desc: 'Kubah Borneo' will bring viewers a closer look of mosques located at several districts in Borneo Island. The host will visit a mosque at a different location to learn and share the history of the mosque.

programme.title: Weekend Vibes S4 Ep06
programme.desc: Program hiburan yang menampilkan pelbagai episod mengikut tema dan disusun khas bagi memenuhi cita rasa serta suasana hati penonton. Setiap episod menawarkan pengalaman muzik yang berbeza.

programme.title: (L) TVS Tengahari

programme.title: TVS Music
programme.desc: TVS Music is a compilation of songs that celebrates the rich and diverse musical talents of the region, featuring a mix of contemporary hits and culturally inspired tracks from local artists.

programme.title: Roots & Remedies Ep13

programme.title: (L) Re Bao
programme.desc: Re Bao memaparkan berita-berita terkini di seluruh Malaysia dalam bahasa Mandarin

programme.title: Be Our Guest Ep01
